weather_line: Northeast winds gathering · brass ducks in motion · biscuit inventory precautionary

stories.headline: Northeast by Nightfall: The Chart Is Unfolded; a Route Is Traced; the Brass Ducks Complete Their Turn
body: At seven-nineteen Wednesday morning, the Hempworth chart was unfolded properly for the first time — fully, on the kitchen table, corners held by the pepper grinder and a library book about drainage systems that Steve declines to confirm he owns. Christine traced the northeastern route with one finger and did not stop at the conditional margin. She went all the way to the edge.

Both brass ducks are now facing northeast. This occurred between seven-nineteen and seven twenty-two, and no one was watching them at the time. The second duck, which had held its quarter-turn position since Tuesday, completed its rotation without comment and is now aligned with the first. The shelf is, for the moment, a settled thing.

Steve has written three notations in the margin. Two are legible. The third is in a shorthand he has not been asked to translate and has not volunteered to explain. The Jeep, sources confirm, is no longer facing southwest. A departure date has not been named. It is, however, the kind of morning on which one could be.

stories.headline: Corridor Now Home to Two Brass Plaques; Duty Goblin Has Developed a Route That Passes Both; Efficiency Disputed
body: The Accounts Liaison Wing corridor — third pillar left — now features two commendations mounted at eye level, the second installed Tuesday following the conclusion of the Luminous Unattended Items matter. Facilities have confirmed the plaques are level. Don's portrait in the newsroom noted, unprompted, that the left bracket on the second frame is carrying more weight than the specification requires, and that whoever hung it will know this eventually.

The duty goblin assigned to the corridor has, as of Wednesday morning, developed a walking route that passes both plaques in a single circuit without appearing to be a circuit. This has added approximately forty-seven seconds to his hourly patrol. When asked whether this constituted inefficiency, he stated that it constituted 'professional orientation' and declined further questions.

Christine passed both plaques on her way to the morning consultation. She did not slow down. The duty goblin, who had been watching from the secondary alcove, made a small note in his ledger and closed it.

stories.headline: Warmest Lap Declared a Contested Zone Following Wednesday Re-Organisation; Jersey Files Formal Objection; Outcome Pending
body: The unfolding of the Hempworth chart on the kitchen table Wednesday morning displaced a throw blanket that had occupied, until that moment, what Jersey considers his primary operational position. The throw was relocated to the armchair. Jersey followed. The armchair, however, had already been assessed and claimed by a party who arrived earlier and has declined to identify herself, though sources describe her as small, dark-eyed, and presenting no evidence of wrongdoing.

Jersey's formal objection — conveyed through sustained proximity and a series of sighs calibrated to register disappointment without aggression — was received by the household and acknowledged. A secondary lap arrangement was proposed. Jersey evaluated it, sat down, and appears to have accepted the terms, though his expression suggests the matter is not fully closed.

stories.headline: Ministry Issues Wednesday Bulletin Confirming Wednesday; Notes That the Week Is at Its Midpoint; Finds This Neither Promising Nor Concerning
body: The Ministry of Magic's Wednesday bulletin confirmed that Wednesday is occurring on schedule and represents the midpoint of the standard seven-day week. The bulletin characterised this position as 'equidistant,' which a spokesperson clarified means the same number of days have passed as remain. When asked whether this was good news, the spokesperson noted that it was accurate news, and that the distinction was important to them personally.

A supplementary note attached to the bulletin confirmed that no luminous unattended items have been logged at Ministry security since Tuesday evening. This was described as a 'return to baseline.' The baseline was not defined. No map was attached, which continues to be, in this correspondent's view, the most interesting thing the Ministry has done all week.

familiars_corner: Lucy: Was not in the kitchen between seven-nineteen and seven twenty-two, has not been asked, and considers the question irrelevant to her current location, which is elsewhere.
Ellie: Watched the brass ducks move for a full minute, approached to investigate, found them stationary, and concluded that they had probably always been like that. Returned to the garden satisfied.

Jersey: Has accepted the secondary lap arrangement under protest and is currently occupying it with the energy of a gentleman who has made his feelings known through correct channels and expects the record to reflect this.
founding_editor_note: The left bracket will tell you when it's had enough. They always do. — D.

in_brief.sport: Wednesday deadlift results withheld pending route confirmation; the chart takes precedence.
in_brief.forecast: Northeast and building · chart conditions optimal · third notation expected to become legible by Thursday, possibly Friday if Steve is enjoying the suspense.

storyline_updates.title: Northeast by Nightfall
storyline_updates.summary: Day 3: The Hempworth chart was fully unfolded Wednesday morning on the kitchen table. Christine traced the northeastern route to the edge. Both brass ducks are now facing northeast, having completed their turn unobserved between seven-nineteen and seven twenty-two. Steve has written three marginal notations; the third remains untranslated. The Jeep has shifted orientation. No departure date has been named, but the morning had the quality of one in which it could be. Day 4 should deliver the resolution: a departure date named, the route committed to, and the northeast destination visited — or the naming of the date itself as the arrival of a settled thing, with the journey implicit and certain.
